{{Quote|I'll remember your face! I'll be waiting|translated=1|Ughok Snorg|<ref name="GG11" />}}
'''Ughok Snorg''' was a loyal, loutish, dull-witted [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] with dark green skin, black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and numerous scars on his face from [[Knife/Legends|knife]] and [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] wounds.

==Biography==
Ughok was an enforcer who was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by [[Valis Lorn]]'s criminal cartel on [[Andasala]] and was charged with maintaining economic and political stability in the [[Ranis quarter]]. In this capacity he oversaw many rackets and other criminal activities on Andasala. He had a reputation for brutality and was said to intensely enjoy his work. He favored using a pair of [[Gamorrean dueling knife|Gamorrean dueling knives]] at close quarters.

He was wanted by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] authorities (TracSheet number: 87332722-SVWU-12339) for multiple counts of assault, assault with the intent to kill, criminal conspiracy, breaking-and-entering, and theft.
